subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The purpose of the Companions of the Cave were they who had detached themselves from worldly conditions, those souls who, through their intense attraction to the divine fragrances, became occupied with the True One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصد از اصحاب کهف نفوسی بودند که از احوال دنیا گذشتند آن اشخاصی که از شدت انجذب بنفحات الهی استغال بحق
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
